'''Traeda''' was an [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] [[Grand Moff/Legends|Grand Moff]]. He was a rival of [[Grand Admiral/Legends|Grand Admiral]] [[Rufaan Tigellinus]], and envied his opponent's quick rise to power.

Some time after the [[Battle of Yavin/Legends|Battle of Yavin]], Traeda lost an important ally, Governor [[Gerald Weizel|Weizel]], who defected to Tigellinus's faction. Around the same time, Traeda attended the [[New Year Fete Week/Legends|New Year Fete Week]] alongside Tigellinus and [[Moff/Legends|Moff]] [[Jaan]], in place of the [[Palpatine/Legends|Emperor]] who had business in the Deep Core.
